creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
KMix incorrectly sets volume levels, e.g. minimal level is 1 instead of 0.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Run "mixer vol 100"
2. Open KMix, verify that level is max.
3. Set minimal volume in opened KMix.
4. Run "mixer vol" - you'll see 1:1 instead of 0:0.
5. Set volume to 50 in KMix.
6. Run "mixer vol" - you'll see 51:51 instead of 50:50.
